description: The Water Supply and Sanitation Department is a government department responsible for providing clean and sufficient drinking water to the rural population, coordinating and monitoring sanitation programs, and implementing urban and rural water supply and sewage disposal programs.

knowledge.summary: The Water Supply and Sanitation Department is a government department responsible for providing clean and sufficient drinking water to the rural population, coordinating and monitoring sanitation programs, and implementing urban and rural water supply and sewage disposal programs.
policies: Maharashtra Water Supply and Sewerage Board Act, 1976

resources.name: Atal Bhujal Yojana
resources.description: A scheme to address the groundwater crisis in the state

resources.name: Jal Jeevan Mission
resources.description: A mission to provide clean drinking water to all households in the state

resources.name: Swachh Bharat Mission
resources.description: A mission to improve sanitation and hygiene in rural areas

resources.name: Maharashtra Jeevan Pradhikaran
resources.description: A board responsible for providing urban and rural water supply and sewerage services

resources.name: Groundwater Surveys and Development Agency
resources.description: An agency responsible for conducting groundwater surveys and development

resources.name: State Water and Sanitation Mission
resources.description: A mission responsible for coordinating and monitoring water supply and sanitation programs
